title: I Am Older. I Am Wiser. Both Are Gifts.
subtitle: A morning affirmation for the decade that carries both
excerpt: A short morning affirmation for the days when being older feels like a cost rather than a resource. The statement names two things that are true at the same time and holds them as equal.

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when being older feels like a disadvantage. Good on birthdays and the days around them.

content.text: A one-minute morning affirmation for the days when older reads as a deficit. The statement holds two facts as equal weight. Neither cancels the other.
New to affirmations as a practice? Read
I am older. I am wiser. Both are gifts.
Say it three times in the morning. Say it slowly, with a pause between each sentence. Say it on the days when you mean it and on the days when you are working toward meaning it.
